folio.label: 177r
folio.l: ligútly ,

And I preye ©ow , æ ©e wol for bere now , to do venge-
au~ce

in swicú manere , æ ©oure good name , may be kept and
concerued ,

And æ men moun haue cause & matere , to preise
©ow of pitee & of mäcy ,

and that ©e haue no cause , to repente
©ow of thyngö æ ©e doon

¢ For Senek seitú ; he ouäcometú
in al yuel otiose dot on y/ODR/ manere , æ repentetú hi~ nougút of his victorie ,
Wherfore I preye ©ow , lat mäcy be in ©oure herte ,

to the effect
& entente , that god al mygúty haue mäcy on ©ow , in his laste
Iuggement ,

witú oute mäcy shal be do to hi~ , æ hatú no mäcy
of a nother wygút

¢ Whan Melibe had herd , the grete skyles
& resons of Dame Pèdence , & hire wyse informaco~ns and
techynges ,

his herte gan enclyne to the wyl of his wyf ,
co~siderynge hire trewe entente ,

enforced hi~ a noon & assented
fully to werken after hire cou~seil ,

& thanked god , of whom
¸cedetú al vertu , & al goodnesse , æ hi~ sente a wyf , of so §
gret discreco~n

¢ And whan the day cam , æ hise aduäsaries
shulde appere in his päsence ,

he spak vn to he~ ful goodly ,
& seide in this wyse

¢ Al be it so , æ of ©oure pride and hey
päsumpco~n and folye , & of ©oure neclygence , & vnkunnynge
©e haue mys born ©ow , & trespaced vn to me ,

©et for as mu-
chel , as I se & byholde ©oure grete humylitee ,

& that ©e ben
sory & repentau~t of ©oure giltes ,

it constreynetú me , to do
©ow grace & mäcy ,
wherfore I receyue ©ow in to my grace ,

& for©eue ©ow outrely , alle the offences Iniuries and wronges
æ ©e haue doon a geyn me & myne ,

to this effect & to this
ende , æ god of hise endeles mäcy ,

wole at the tyme of oure
deyynge , for ©eue vs oure giltes , æ we han trespaced to hi~
in this wrecched world ,

for doutelees , if we be sory and re-
pentau~t , of the sy~nes & giltes whicú we han trespasced
inne , in the sigúte of oure lord god ,

he is so free & so mäcya-
ble ,
æ he wole for ©euen vs oure giltes ,

and bryngen vs
to the blisse , that neuere hatú ende ; Amen
Heere is ended Chaucers tale of Melibe ;
